hero.title: Hi, I'm Mahesh Mali
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Developer & AI Enthusiast
hero.description: I craft intelligent web experiences that bridge human creativity with artificial intelligence.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm Mahesh Mali, a passionate full-stack web developer and AI tools enthusiast based in India.
about.body:
My journey in tech started with a curiosity about how things work on the internet. Over time, that curiosity evolved into a deep passion for building intelligent, scalable web applications. I specialize in creating seamless user experiences powered by modern AI technologies.

I believe technology should empower people, not overwhelm them. That's why every project I build focuses on clarity, performance, and meaningful interaction. Whether it's a sleek portfolio site or a complex AI-driven platform, I bring the same energy and attention to detail.

projects.title: AI Chat Platform
projects.description: A real-time chat application powered by natural language processing. Features include smart responses, context awareness, and multi-user support.

projects.title: E-Commerce Dashboard
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce management system with real-time analytics, inventory management, and automated reporting tools.

projects.title: Smart Portfolio Builder
projects.description: A drag-and-drop portfolio builder that uses AI to suggest optimal layouts and content structure for professionals.

projects.title: Lead Intelligence CRM
projects.description: An intelligent CRM that scores leads using behavioral analytics and predicts conversion probability with machine learning.

chatbot_knowledge.response: Hello! 👋 I'm Mahesh's AI assistant. I can tell you about his work, skills, and projects. What would you like to know?
I'm an AI assistant built for Mahesh Mali's platform. I can answer questions about Mahesh, his projects, skills, and how to get in touch with him.

Mahesh Mali is a passionate full-stack developer and AI enthusiast from India. He specializes in building intelligent web applications and has expertise in JavaScript, React, Node.js, and AI integration.

Mahesh is skilled in: HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, REST APIs, AI/ML Integration, and UI/UX Design. He loves building products that combine great design with intelligent functionality.
Mahesh has built several impressive projects including an AI Chat Platform, E-Commerce Dashboard, Smart Portfolio Builder, and Lead Intelligence CRM. Check out the Projects page for details!
You can contact Mahesh via the Contact page, or feel free to leave your details here and he'll get back to you personally! 📧 Email: maheshmali11884@gmail.com
Mahesh works on both freelance and full-time projects. For pricing, it depends on the project scope. The best way is to reach out directly via the Contact page or submit your details here.
Mahesh is currently open to new project discussions. Reach out via the Contact page for availability and timelines.
Mahesh has several years of experience in web development and has been building AI-powered applications since the early days of accessible AI APIs.
I can help you learn about Mahesh's skills, projects, and services. I can also help connect you with Mahesh directly if you'd like to work together! Just ask me anything.
Goodbye! 👋 If you have any more questions about Mahesh or want to get in touch, just come back and ask. Have a great day!
Mahesh is based in India and works with clients globally. He's available for remote projects worldwide!
